task_description: Upgrade the subtitle video with ambition-themed background image, fade transitions, and dynamic subtitle styling while keeping audio untouched

verification.summary: Output video verified: 576x1024 H.264 video with ambition-themed background (dark navy/purple gradients, geometric patterns, radial glow, vignette), golden/amber styled subtitles (FontSize=34, bold, 3px outline, shadow), fade-in/fade-out transitions (1.5s), and AAC audio (codec copy, untouched). Duration: 60.7s. File size: ~1MB. All files committed to git.
